description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a scattering of white sesame seeds on the top. The upper bun sits atop a layer of crisp, leafy green lettuce, followed by slices of red tomato and white onion rings. Beneath the vegetables, a slice of yellow cheese drapes over a thick, dark brown beef patty. The bottom bun is slightly lighter in color and supports the entire stack. The ingredients are neatly layered, with the toppings visibly protruding from the sides, giving the burger a fresh and appetizing appearance.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese, and a beef patty, all stacked in a neat, appetizing arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sesame seed bun, lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese, and patty with all toppings clearly visible and slightly protruding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lettuce and tomato layers, with the cheese and patty partially visible beneath the toppings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the onion rings and cheese slice, as well as the layered structure of the burger.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the lettuce and tomato, with the cheese and patty less visible and the bun's roundness prominent.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly under the top bun, followed by tomato slices, onion rings, a slice of cheese, and a beef patty above the bottom bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and visibly protrude from the sides.
